arts.ttl: 'Source has confirmed': £45m Chelsea player won't be leaving in January despite frustrations - journalist
arts.sum: He's made just two league starts this season.

arts.ttl: Armando Broja reveals Everton made several attempts to sign him as striker vows to help solve his side's goalscoring problems
arts.sum: Broja, 23, made his first start under Sean Dyche in Sunday's 2-0 home defeat against Nottingham Forest which left Everton three points above the drop zone.

arts.ttl: €95m Kolo Muani to Chelsea? The TRUTH behind the rumour
arts.sum: Chelsea are not interested in Randal Kolo Muani despite fresh links with the Paris Saint-Germain striker, according to a report. Chelsea are not interested in Kolo Muani, but they are still looking at potential striker options.

Ipswich battled well, but were narrowly overcome by Arsenal at the Emirates on Friday evening. Chelsea, meanwhile, fell to only their third league defeat of the campaign so far, when Fulham claimed t...

arts.ttl: How to watch Ipswich vs Chelsea - TV channel, live stream and kick off time
arts.sum: Chelsea's trip to Ipswich is scheduled to kick off at 7.45pm on Monday, December 30 at Portman Road. Chelsea will look to end 2024 in perfect fashion when they travel to Ipswich Town in the Premier League on Sunday night.

arts.ttl: Chelsea are now interested in signing 'technical' defender who scored against Tottenham this season - journalist
arts.sum: That will put him in Chelsea supporters' good books.

arts.ttl: Chelsea make five players available for transfer in January including Ben Chilwell
arts.sum: Chelsea are no strangers to trying to offload unwanted players – and the January transfer window will be no different as Enzo Maresca tries to trim his squad. Despite paying £20million to bring him in from Aston Villa last year, they're now reportedly demanding a steep £40million for the midfielder who's barely featured in the team with only five appearances this term, all coming in less prominent competitions like the Carabao Cup or Conference League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea set to enquire about transfer of Premier League star in January
arts.sum: Chelsea are reportedly showing an interest in Dean Huijsen and could be set to enquire about the Bournemouth defender in the January transfer window. The talented 19-year-old has shone since joining Bournemouth from Juventus in the summer, having also previously caught the eye in Serie A during a loan spell at Roma. According to Simon […] The post Chelsea set to enquire about transfer of Premier League star in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea handed triple early team news hint as Enzo Maresca faces Noni Madueke decision
arts.sum: Chelsea go into the game against Ipswich knowing that a win will take them back up to second place in the Premier League table. Two other players in Enzo Fernandez and Moises Caicedo have also shared a similar graphic on their Instagram stories, indicating that the duo will again start in midfield as they did against Fulham.

arts.ttl: Man City are in danger of losing ANOTHER young star after Cole Palmer and Morgan Rogers - as Bayer Leverkusen lead the chase with midfielder's contract running out
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are emerging as contenders to sign Manchester City midfielder James McAtee. The 22-year old came off the bench to play a decisive cameo in City's victory over Leicester City.
